summary: Iteration 65 - Wealth Command v7.1.0 CRM Foundation Testing Complete. All 47 backend API tests passed (100%). Tested Household Intelligence (family trees, entities, professionals, net worth) and Compliance & Audit Layer (audit logs, KYC/AML, documents, approvals).
critical_code_review_comments: All v7.1.0 CRM Foundation features working correctly
Household Intelligence APIs (6 endpoints): list, detail, family-tree, entities, professionals, net-worth - all returning correct data
Compliance & Audit APIs (8 endpoints): dashboard, audit-log, audit-log/summary, kyc/dashboard, kyc/{client_id}, documents, approvals, approvals/dashboard - all working
Wheeler Family demo data: 6 members across 3 generations, 4 entities (trusts, companies, SMSF), 3 professionals
Compliance demo data: 5 audit log entries, 2 KYC records, 3 documents, 3 approval requests
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - all APIs use in-memory demo data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 65 verified all v7.1.0 CRM Foundation features: Household Intelligence (Wheeler Family with 6 members, 4 entities, 3 professionals) and Compliance & Audit Layer (audit logs, KYC/AML workflows, document management, approval workflows). All data is MOCKED/DEMO stored in memory.

mocked_apis.Household_Intelligence: MOCKED - Wheeler Family demo data stored in memory
mocked_apis.Compliance_Audit: MOCKED - Demo audit logs, KYC records, documents, approvals stored in memory

features_verified.household_detail: WORKING - Returns complete household with aggregated financials
features_verified.household_family_tree: WORKING - Returns nodes/edges for family tree visualization
features_verified.household_entities: WORKING - Returns trusts, companies, SMSFs with roles
features_verified.household_professionals: WORKING - Returns accountant, lawyer, mortgage broker network
features_verified.household_net_worth: WORKING - Returns aggregated net worth by asset class
features_verified.compliance_dashboard: WORKING - Returns KYC, approvals, documents, audit summary
features_verified.audit_log: WORKING - Returns audit entries with filtering
features_verified.audit_log_summary: WORKING - Returns activity summary by action/user/resource
features_verified.kyc_dashboard: WORKING - Returns KYC status overview with expiring/pending
features_verified.kyc_client: WORKING - Returns client KYC record with verification details
features_verified.documents: WORKING - Returns document list with filtering by client/type
features_verified.approvals: WORKING - Returns approval requests with pending count
